things.name: Fort Jesus
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 16th-century Portuguese fort guarding the entrance to Mombasa harbour

things.name: Diani Beach
things.description: One of Africa's finest beaches - white coral sand and turquoise Indian Ocean 35km south

things.name: Old Town Mombasa
things.description: Arab and Swahili old town with carved doors, mosques and the spice market

things.name: Watamu Marine National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage marine reserve with sea turtles and whale sharks

things.name: Tsavo East & West National Parks
things.description: Kenya's largest national park with red elephants, 500 bird species and Mzima Springs

things.name: Haller Park
things.description: Former cement quarry restored to a wildlife sanctuary with hippos and giraffes

things.name: Shimba Hills National Reserve
things.description: Home of the sable antelope - only remaining population in Kenya

things.name: Nyali & Bamburi Beaches
things.description: North Mombasa's resort beaches with watersports and beach bars

things.name: Swahili Cultural Dhow Cruise
things.description: Traditional dhow sailing with Swahili food and taarab music at sunset

things.name: Biryani at Swahili Plate
things.description: Mombasa's famous Swahili coconut rice biryani with pilipili chilli
